note: Read-only. Re-read values are produced by the real production selector; numerals are canonicalized by a mirror of production canonicalizeAlcoholNumber.

results.rationale: Two independent recognitions of the same pixels read the same different number: the digits themselves are unstable, so the asserted value is not supported by its own evidence.
results.additionalOcrCalls: 2 per accepted case (2 PSMs on one crop)

results.rationale: A re-read that shows the decimal point itself has resolved the punctuation, so its disagreement is about digit identity rather than about a lost separator — the dominant re-read artefact.
results.additionalOcrCalls: 2 per accepted case (2 PSMs on one crop)

results.rationale: If neither re-read needed implicit-decimal recovery, the disagreement is not manufactured by the recovery rule that re-reads most often trip.
results.additionalOcrCalls: 2 per accepted case (2 PSMs on one crop)

results.rationale: A re-read that assembles a complete, accepted alcohol statement is evidence of equal kind to the selected one; a bare numeral is not.
results.additionalOcrCalls: 2 per accepted case (2 PSMs on one crop)

results.rationale: A contradiction carries weight only when the contradicting recognition is at least as well resolved as the one it contradicts.
results.additionalOcrCalls: 2 per accepted case (2 PSMs on one crop)

results.rationale: Agreement between a token-union crop and an independently derived full-width line band cannot be an artefact of one crop's framing.
results.additionalOcrCalls: 2 per accepted case (1 token-union + 1 line band)

results.rationale: Two different page-segmentation modes agree AND both retain whatever separator the selected reading had, so no punctuation was dropped on the way to the disagreement.
results.additionalOcrCalls: 2 per accepted case (2 PSMs on one crop)

results.rationale: Light-on-dark artwork is the condition under which the primary full-image pass is measurably least reliable, so a contradiction there is more likely to be real.
results.additionalOcrCalls: 2 per accepted case (2 PSMs on one crop)

results.rationale: The line band recovers context the full-image pass loses; if it also disagrees, the disagreement survives a change of both framing and segmentation mode.
results.additionalOcrCalls: 2 per accepted case (2 PSMs on one crop)
